testcase.name: @BeforeMethod beforeTest

failure.message: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @BeforeMethod annotated beforeTest. For more information on native dependency injection please refer to https://testng.org/#_dependency_injection

testcase.failure: org.testng.TestNGException: Can inject only one of <ITestContext, XmlTest, Method, Object[], ITestResult> into a @BeforeMethod annotated beforeTest. Removed 14 stack frames
